description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal slip-ons with a pointed toe design from provogue adds that extra bounce to your step. Perfect for those who love to slip in and out of their footwear with ease, this pair offers comfort and style with its perforated pattern. Team it with jeans, chinos or even formal trousers for that classy look.Upper Crinkled leather upper for added durability and style Pointed toe design with a perforated pattern for a more stylish look Stitch detailing in definite pattern on the forefoot region Hidden elastic gores on either side of the lace closure for a versatile Fit Slip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Lightly padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug fit Zipper on the medial side for added ease of comfort Metal dangling loop attached on the lateral side beside the ankle for maximum style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Cushioned footbed for added comfort Leather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
